option.name: filePath
option.value: /libs.versions (snapshot).toml

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="24dp" android:paddingTop="48dp" android:paddingEnd="24dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- Logo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivLogo" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:contentDescription="@string/login_logo_description" android:src="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:scaleType="fitCenter" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Naslov --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/login_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceHeadlineMedium" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ivLogo" />
<!-- Email / Korisničko ime --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlEmail" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:hint="@string/login_hint_email" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Lozinka --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/login_hint_password" app:endIconMode="password_toggle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlEmail">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Zaboravljena lozinka --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvForgotPassword" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="@string/login_forgot_password" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlPassword" />
<!-- Dugme Prijavi se --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLogin" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/login_button_label" android:textAllCaps="false" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvForgotPassword" />
<!-- Registracija --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvRegister" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="@string/login_no_account" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnLogin" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="24dp" android:paddingTop="48dp" android:paddingEnd="24dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- Logo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivLogo" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:contentDescription="@string/login_logo_description" android:src="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:scaleType="fitCenter" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Naslov --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/login_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceHeadlineMedium" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ivLogo" />
<!-- Email / Korisničko ime --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlEmail" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:hint="@string/login_hint_email" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Lozinka --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/login_hint_password" app:endIconMode="password_toggle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlEmail">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Zaboravljena lozinka --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvForgotPassword" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="@string/login_forgot_password" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlPassword" />
<!-- ProgressBar — vidljiv samo tokom Firebase poziva --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbLoading" style="?attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvForgotPassword" />
<!-- Dugme Prijavi se --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLogin" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/login_button_label" android:textAllCaps="false" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/pbLoading" />
<!-- Registracija --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvRegister" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="@string/login_no_account" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnLogin" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="24dp" android:paddingTop="40dp" android:paddingEnd="24dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- Naslov --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/register_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceHeadlineMedium" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Avatar kontejner --> <com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/ivAvatar" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="100dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:contentDescription="@string/register_avatar_description" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@mipmap/ic_launcher" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/ShapeAppearance.Avatar.Circle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<!-- Promeni avatar --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvChangeAvatar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="@string/register_change_avatar" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ivAvatar" />
<!-- Email --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlEmail" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_email" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvChangeAvatar">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Korisničko ime --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlUsername" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_username" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlEmail">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etUsername" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textNoSuggestions" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Lozinka --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_password" app:endIconMode="password_toggle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlUsername">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Potvrda lozinke --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlConfirmPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_confirm_password" app:endIconMode="password_toggle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlPassword">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etConfirmPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Region (Material Exposed Dropdown) --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlRegion" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox.ExposedDropdownMenu" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_region" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlConfirmPassword">
<AutoCompleteTextView android:id="@+id/actvRegion" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="none" android:focusable="false" android:focusableInTouchMode="false" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Dugme Registruj se --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRegister" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/register_button_label" android:textAllCaps="false" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlRegion" />
<!-- Prijava --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvLogin" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="@string/register_have_account" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnRegister" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="24dp" android:paddingTop="40dp" android:paddingEnd="24dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- Naslov --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/register_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceHeadlineMedium" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Avatar kontejner --> <com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/ivAvatar" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="100dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:contentDescription="@string/register_avatar_description" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@mipmap/ic_launcher" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/ShapeAppearance.Avatar.Circle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<!-- Promeni avatar --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvChangeAvatar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="@string/register_change_avatar" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ivAvatar" />
<!-- Email --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlEmail" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_email" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvChangeAvatar">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Korisničko ime --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlUsername" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_username" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlEmail">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etUsername" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textNoSuggestions" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Lozinka --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_password" app:endIconMode="password_toggle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlUsername">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Potvrda lozinke --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlConfirmPassword" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_confirm_password" app:endIconMode="password_toggle" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlPassword">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etConfirmPassword" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPassword" android:maxLines="1" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Region (Material Exposed Dropdown) --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tlRegion" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox.ExposedDropdownMenu" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/register_hint_region" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlConfirmPassword">
<AutoCompleteTextView android:id="@+id/actvRegion" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="none" android:focusable="false" android:focusableInTouchMode="false" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- ProgressBar — vidljiv samo tokom Firebase poziva --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbLoading" style="?attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tlRegion" />
<!-- Dugme Registruj se --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRegister" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/register_button_label" android:textAllCaps="false" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/pbLoading" />
<!-- Prijava --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvLogin" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:text="@string/register_have_account" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnRegister" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Slagalica</string>
<!-- Korak po korak igra --> <string name="korak_player_label">Igra: %s</string> <string name="korak_round_label">Runda %d/2</string> <string name="korak_score_label">%d ⭐</string> <string name="korak_hint_locked"> Zaključan</string> <string name="korak_hint_input">Tvoja pretpostavka</string> <string name="korak_btn_guess">Pogodi</string> <string name="korak_btn_give_up">Predaj</string> <string name="korak_time_up">Vreme je isteklo</string>
<!-- Moj broj igra --> <string name="moj_broj_player_label">Igra: %s</string> <string name="moj_broj_round_label">Runda %d/2</string> <string name="moj_broj_score_label">%d ⭐</string> <string name="moj_broj_target_default">?</string> <string name="moj_broj_number_default">?</string> <string name="moj_broj_hint_izraz">Tvoj izraz</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_left_paren">(</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_right_paren">)</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_plus">+</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_minus">-</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_mult">×</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_div">÷</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_backspace">←</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_clear">C</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_stop">STOP</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_potvrdi">✓</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_give_up">Predaj</string> <string name="moj_broj_toast_kt1_validate">(KT1) Validacija izraza</string> <string name="moj_broj_time_up">Vreme je isteklo</string>
<!-- Zajedničke greške --> <string name="error_field_required">Ovo polje je obavezno</string> <string name="error_invalid_email">Unesite ispravnu email adresu</string> <string name="error_username_too_short">Korisničko ime mora imati najmanje 3 karaktera</string> <string name="error_username_invalid_chars">Korisničko ime sme sadržati samo slova, cifre i donju crtu</string> <string name="error_password_too_short">Lozinka mora imati najmanje 6 karaktera</string> <string name="error_passwords_do_not_match">Lozinke se ne poklapaju</string> <string name="error_region_not_selected">Izaberite region</string> <string name="register_success_mock">Registracija uspešna (mock). Proveri mejl za potvrdu.</string>
<!-- Login ekran --> <string name="login_title">Slagalica</string> <string name="login_hint_email">Email ili korisničko ime</string> <string name="login_hint_password">Lozinka</string> <string name="login_button_label">Prijavi se</string> <string name="login_forgot_password">Zaboravljena lozinka?</string> <string name="login_no_account">Nemaš nalog? Registruj se</string> <string name="login_logo_description">Logo aplikacije</string>
<!-- Registracija ekran --> <string name="register_title">Registracija</string> <string name="register_hint_email">Email adresa</string> <string name="register_hint_username">Korisničko ime</string> <string name="register_hint_password">Lozinka</string> <string name="register_hint_confirm_password">Potvrda lozinke</string> <string name="register_hint_region">Region</string> <string name="register_button_label">Registruj se</string> <string name="register_have_account">Već imaš nalog? Prijavi se</string> <string name="register_dialog_verify_title">Proveri mejl</string> <string name="register_dialog_verify_message">Poslat ti je verifikacioni mejl. Klikni link u mejlu pa se vrati i prijavi.</string> <string name="register_dialog_verify_ok">U redu</string> <string name="register_avatar_description">Avatar korisnika</string> <string name="register_change_avatar">Promeni avatar</string>
<!-- Promena lozinke ekran --> <string name="forgot_password_title">Promena lozinke</string> <string name="forgot_password_hint_current">Trenutna lozinka</string> <string name="forgot_password_hint_new">Nova lozinka</string> <string name="forgot_password_hint_confirm">Potvrda nove lozinke</string> <string name="forgot_password_button_change">Promeni lozinku</string> <string name="forgot_password_button_cancel">Otkaži</string> <string name="main_btn_play">Igraj</string> <string name="main_btn_leaderboard">Rang lista</string> <string name="main_btn_friends">Prijatelji</string> <string name="main_btn_region">Region</string> <string name="main_btn_notifications">Notifikacije</string> <string name="main_btn_chat">Čet</string> <string name="main_btn_logout">Odjava</string> <string name="main_chip_tokens">Žetoni: %d</string> <string name="main_chip_stars">Zvezde: %d</string> <string name="main_chip_league">Liga: %d</string> <string name="main_coming_soon">Otvaranje %s (uskoro)</string>
<!-- Meni igara --> <string name="game_menu_title">Igre</string> <string name="game_menu_subtitle">Izaberi igru za demo (KT1)</string> <string name="game_menu_btn_play">Igraj</string> <string name="game_kzz_name">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="game_kzz_desc">5 pitanja sa 4 ponuđena odgovora · 5s po pitanju · max 50 bodova</string> <string name="game_spojnice_name">Spojnice</string> <string name="game_spojnice_desc">Poveži 5 pojmova leve i desne kolone · 2 runde · 30s po rundi</string> <string name="game_korak_name">Korak po korak</string> <string name="game_korak_desc">Pogodi pojam kroz 7 koraka · 2 runde · 70s po rundi</string> <string name="game_moj_broj_name">Moj broj</string> <string name="game_moj_broj_desc">Izrazi traženi broj sa 6 datih brojeva · 2 runde · 60s po rundi</string> <string name="game_skocko_name">Skočko</string> <string name="game_skocko_desc">Pogodi kombinaciju 4 simbola · 6 pokušaja · 30s</string> <string name="game_asoc_name">Asocijacije</string> <string name="game_asoc_desc">Pogodi asocijacije kroz polja A-D · 120s</string>
<!-- Profil --> <string name="profile_title">Profil</string> <string name="profile_btn_change_avatar">Promeni avatar</string> <string name="profile_toast_avatar_soon">Izmena avatara (uskoro)</string> <string name="profile_label_tokens">Žetoni: %d</string> <string name="profile_label_stars">Zvezde: %d ⭐</string> <string name="profile_label_league">Liga: %s</string> <string name="profile_label_region">Region: %s</string> <string name="profile_qr_title">QR kod za poziv prijatelja</string> <string name="profile_qr_placeholder">[ QR ]</string> <string name="profile_stats_title">Statistika</string> <string name="profile_total_games">Ukupno partija: %d</string> <string name="profile_win_rate">Pobede / Porazi: %d%% / %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_kzz_title">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="profile_stat_kzz">Pogođena pitanja: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_kzz_detail">Pogođeno: %d | Promašeno: %d</string> <string name="profile_stat_moj_broj_title">Moj broj</string> <string name="profile_stat_moj_broj">Tačan rezultat: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_korak_title">Korak po korak</string> <string name="profile_stat_korak">Prosečan korak pogotka: %.1f / 7</string> <string name="profile_stat_asoc_title">Asocijacije</string> <string name="profile_stat_asoc">Rešeno: %d%% | Nerešeno: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_skocko_title">Skočko</string> <string name="profile_stat_skocko">Pogodak u 1–2. pokušaju: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_spojnice_title">Spojnice</string> <string name="profile_stat_spojnice">Uspešno povezano: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_btn_logout">Odjava</string> <string name="profile_section_divider">──────────────</string>
<!-- Ko zna zna --> <string name="kzz_title">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="kzz_player_label">Igra: %s</string> <string name="kzz_question_label">Pitanje %d / 5</string> <string name="kzz_time_left">%d s</string> <string name="kzz_score_label">Bodovi: %d</string> <string name="kzz_correct">Tačno! +10</string> <string name="kzz_wrong">Netačno! −5</string> <string name="kzz_time_up">Vreme isteklo!</string> <string name="kzz_round_end">Kraj igre! Bodovi: %d</string> <string name="kzz_btn_give_up">Predaj</string>
<!-- Spojnice --> <string name="spojnice_title">Spojnice</string> <string name="spojnice_player_label">Igra: %s</string> <string name="spojnice_round_label">Runda %d / 2</string> <string name="spojnice_time_left">%d s</string> <string name="spojnice_scores_label">I1: %d | I2: %d</string> <string name="spojnice_criterion_label">Kriterijum: %s</string> <string name="spojnice_instruction">Tapni levo pa desno da povežeš pojmove</string> <string name="spojnice_correct">+2</string> <string name="spojnice_wrong">Netačno</string> <string name="spojnice_transition">Red na %s</string> <string name="spojnice_no_remaining">Svi pojmovi su povezani!</string> <string name="spojnice_round_end">Kraj runde!</string> <string name="spojnice_game_end">Kraj igre! Igrač 1: %d | Igrač 2: %d</string> <string name="spojnice_btn_give_up">Predaj</string> <string name="spojnice_player1">Igrač 1</string> <string name="spojnice_player2">Igrač 2</string> <string name="spojnice_time_up">Vreme isteklo!</string>
<!-- Skočko --> <string name="skocko_title">Skočko</string> <string name="skocko_time_left">%d s</string> <string name="skocko_instruction">Pogodi tačnu kombinaciju u 6 pokušaja</string> <string name="skocko_btn_give_up">Predaj</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_smiley">Smeško</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_square">Kvadrat</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_circle">Krug</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_heart">Srce</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_triangle">Trougao</string> <string name="skocko_slot_desc">Polje pokušaja</string> <string name="skocko_solution_desc">Rešenje</string>
<!-- Regioni --> <string-array name="regions_array"> <item>Beograd</item> <item>Vojvodina</item> <item>Šumadija</item> <item>Zapadna Srbija</item> <item>Istočna Srbija</item> <item>Južna Srbija</item> <item>Kosovo i Metohija</item> </string-array>
<!-- Asocijacije --> <string name="asoc_title">Asocijacije</string> <string name="asoc_time_left">%d s</string> <string name="asoc_a1">A1</string> <string name="asoc_a2">A2</string> <string name="asoc_a3">A3</string> <string name="asoc_a4">A4</string> <string name="asoc_b1">B1</string> <string name="asoc_b2">B2</string> <string name="asoc_b3">B3</string> <string name="asoc_b4">B4</string> <string name="asoc_a">A</string> <string name="asoc_b">B</string> <string name="asoc_center">\?\?\?</string> <string name="asoc_c">C</string> <string name="asoc_d">D</string> <string name="asoc_c4">C4</string> <string name="asoc_c3">C3</string> <string name="asoc_c2">C2</string> <string name="asoc_c1">C1</string> <string name="asoc_d4">D4</string> <string name="asoc_d3">D3</string> <string name="asoc_d2">D2</string> <string name="asoc_d1">D1</string> <string name="asoc_btn_give_up">Predaj</string>
<!-- Notifikacije --> <string name="notifications_title">Notifikacije</string> <string name="notifications_filter_all">Sve</string> <string name="notifications_filter_read">Pročitane</string> <string name="notifications_filter_unread">Nepročitane</string> <string name="notifications_mark_all_read">Označi sve kao pročitano</string> <string name="notifications_empty">Nema notifikacija</string>
<string name="notification_type_chat">ČET</string> <string name="notification_type_ranking">RANG</string> <string name="notification_type_reward">NAGRADA</string> <string name="notification_type_general">OPŠTE</string> <string name="notification_type_friend_invite">PRIJATELJ</string> <string name="notification_type_league">LIGA</string>
<string name="notification_title_chat">Nova poruka</string> <string name="notification_message_chat">Marko Vam je poslao/la poruku</string> <string name="notification_title_ranking">Rang lista</string> <string name="notification_message_ranking">Postali ste #5 na rang listi</string> <string name="notification_title_reward">Dnevna nagrada</string> <string name="notification_message_reward">Otključali ste dnevnu nagradu</string> <string name="notification_title_general">Liga</string> <string name="notification_message_general">Dobrodošli u novu ligu</string> <string name="notification_title_friend_invite">Zahtev za prijateljstvo</string> <string name="notification_message_friend_invite">Ana Vam je poslala zahtev za prijateljstvo</string> <string name="notification_title_league">Nova liga</string> <string name="notification_message_league">Uznapredovali ste do Srebrne lige!</string>
<string name="notification_action_claim">Preuzmi</string> <string name="notification_action_accept">Prihvati</string>
<string name="notification_channel_chat_name">Ćaskanje</string> <string name="notification_channel_chat_desc">Obaveštenja o porukama u četu</string> <string name="notification_channel_ranking_name">Rang lista</string> <string name="notification_channel_ranking_desc">Promene na rang listi i rezultatima</string> <string name="notification_channel_reward_name">Nagrade</string> <string name="notification_channel_reward_desc">Dnevne i posebne nagrade</string> <string name="notification_channel_general_name">Opšta</string> <string name="notification_channel_general_desc">Opšta obaveštenja aplikacije</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Slagalica</string>
<!-- Korak po korak igra --> <string name="korak_player_label">Igra: %s</string> <string name="korak_round_label">Runda %d/2</string> <string name="korak_score_label">%d ⭐</string> <string name="korak_hint_locked"> Zaključan</string> <string name="korak_hint_input">Tvoja pretpostavka</string> <string name="korak_btn_guess">Pogodi</string> <string name="korak_btn_give_up">Predaj</string> <string name="korak_time_up">Vreme je isteklo</string> <string name="korak_loading">Učitavanje zadatka…</string> <string name="korak_dialog_correct_title">Bravo!</string> <string name="korak_dialog_correct_msg">+%d bodova</string> <string name="korak_dialog_timeout_title">Nisi pogodio</string> <string name="korak_dialog_timeout_msg">Tačan odgovor je: %s</string> <string name="korak_dialog_next_round">Sledeća runda</string> <string name="korak_dialog_finish">Završi igru</string> <string name="korak_dialog_give_up_title">Da li si siguran?</string> <string name="korak_dialog_give_up_msg">Igra će biti izgubljena.</string> <string name="korak_dialog_give_up_yes">Predaj</string> <string name="korak_dialog_give_up_no">Nastavi</string> <string name="korak_wrong_answer">Pogrešan odgovor. Pokušaj ponovo!</string> <string name="korak_result_extra">bodovi</string>
<!-- Moj broj igra --> <string name="moj_broj_player_label">Igra: %s</string> <string name="moj_broj_round_label">Runda %d/2</string> <string name="moj_broj_score_label">%d ⭐</string> <string name="moj_broj_target_default">?</string> <string name="moj_broj_number_default">?</string> <string name="moj_broj_hint_izraz">Tvoj izraz</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_left_paren">(</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_right_paren">)</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_plus">+</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_minus">-</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_mult">×</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_div">÷</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_backspace">←</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_clear">C</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_stop">STOP</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_potvrdi">✓</string> <string name="moj_broj_btn_give_up">Predaj</string> <string name="moj_broj_toast_kt1_validate">(KT1) Validacija izraza</string> <string name="moj_broj_time_up">Vreme je isteklo</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_correct_title">Tačno!</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_correct_msg">+10 bodova! Tvoj izraz daje %d.</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_near_title">Nije tačno</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_near_msg">Tvoj rezultat: %d (cilj: %d)</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_timeout_title">Vreme isteklo</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_timeout_msg">Nisi uneo izraz. Cilj je bio: %d</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_next_round">Sledeća runda</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_finish">Završi igru</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_give_up_title">Da li si siguran?</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_give_up_msg">Igra će biti izgubljena.</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_give_up_yes">Predaj</string> <string name="moj_broj_dialog_give_up_no">Nastavi</string> <string name="moj_broj_hint_stop_first">Pritisni STOP da se generiše traženi broj</string> <string name="moj_broj_hint_stop_second">Pritisni STOP da se prikažu dostupni brojevi</string>
<!-- Zajedničke greške --> <string name="error_field_required">Ovo polje je obavezno</string> <string name="error_invalid_email">Unesite ispravnu email adresu</string> <string name="error_username_too_short">Korisničko ime mora imati najmanje 3 karaktera</string> <string name="error_username_invalid_chars">Korisničko ime sme sadržati samo slova, cifre i donju crtu</string> <string name="error_password_too_short">Lozinka mora imati najmanje 6 karaktera</string> <string name="error_passwords_do_not_match">Lozinke se ne poklapaju</string> <string name="error_region_not_selected">Izaberite region</string> <string name="register_success_mock">Registracija uspešna (mock). Proveri mejl za potvrdu.</string>
<!-- Login ekran --> <string name="login_title">Slagalica</string> <string name="login_hint_email">Email ili korisničko ime</string> <string name="login_hint_password">Lozinka</string> <string name="login_button_label">Prijavi se</string> <string name="login_forgot_password">Zaboravljena lozinka?</string> <string name="login_no_account">Nemaš nalog? Registruj se</string> <string name="login_logo_description">Logo aplikacije</string>
<!-- Registracija ekran --> <string name="register_title">Registracija</string> <string name="register_hint_email">Email adresa</string> <string name="register_hint_username">Korisničko ime</string> <string name="register_hint_password">Lozinka</string> <string name="register_hint_confirm_password">Potvrda lozinke</string> <string name="register_hint_region">Region</string> <string name="register_button_label">Registruj se</string> <string name="register_have_account">Već imaš nalog? Prijavi se</string> <string name="register_dialog_verify_title">Proveri mejl</string> <string name="register_dialog_verify_message">Poslat ti je verifikacioni mejl. Klikni link u mejlu pa se vrati i prijavi.</string> <string name="register_dialog_verify_ok">U redu</string> <string name="register_avatar_description">Avatar korisnika</string> <string name="register_change_avatar">Promeni avatar</string>
<!-- Promena lozinke ekran --> <string name="forgot_password_title">Promena lozinke</string> <string name="forgot_password_hint_current">Trenutna lozinka</string> <string name="forgot_password_hint_new">Nova lozinka</string> <string name="forgot_password_hint_confirm">Potvrda nove lozinke</string> <string name="forgot_password_button_change">Promeni lozinku</string> <string name="forgot_password_button_cancel">Otkaži</string> <string name="forgot_password_success_mock">Lozinka promenjena (mock)</string>
<!-- Glavni ekran --> <string name="main_welcome">Dobrodošao!</string> <string name="main_btn_profile">Profil</string> <string name="main_btn_play">Igraj</string> <string name="main_btn_leaderboard">Rang lista</string> <string name="main_btn_friends">Prijatelji</string> <string name="main_btn_region">Region</string> <string name="main_btn_notifications">Notifikacije</string> <string name="main_btn_chat">Čet</string> <string name="main_btn_logout">Odjava</string> <string name="main_chip_tokens">Žetoni: %d</string> <string name="main_chip_stars">Zvezde: %d</string> <string name="main_chip_league">Liga: %d</string> <string name="main_coming_soon">Otvaranje %s (uskoro)</string>
<!-- Meni igara --> <string name="game_menu_title">Igre</string> <string name="game_menu_subtitle">Izaberi igru za demo (KT1)</string> <string name="game_menu_btn_play">Igraj</string> <string name="game_kzz_name">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="game_kzz_desc">5 pitanja sa 4 ponuđena odgovora · 5s po pitanju · max 50 bodova</string> <string name="game_spojnice_name">Spojnice</string> <string name="game_spojnice_desc">Poveži 5 pojmova leve i desne kolone · 2 runde · 30s po rundi</string> <string name="game_korak_name">Korak po korak</string> <string name="game_korak_desc">Pogodi pojam kroz 7 koraka · 2 runde · 70s po rundi</string> <string name="game_moj_broj_name">Moj broj</string> <string name="game_moj_broj_desc">Izrazi traženi broj sa 6 datih brojeva · 2 runde · 60s po rundi</string> <string name="game_skocko_name">Skočko</string> <string name="game_skocko_desc">Pogodi kombinaciju 4 simbola · 6 pokušaja · 30s</string> <string name="game_asoc_name">Asocijacije</string> <string name="game_asoc_desc">Pogodi asocijacije kroz polja A-D · 120s</string>
<!-- Profil --> <string name="profile_title">Profil</string> <string name="profile_btn_change_avatar">Promeni avatar</string> <string name="profile_toast_avatar_soon">Izmena avatara (uskoro)</string> <string name="profile_label_tokens">Žetoni: %d</string> <string name="profile_label_stars">Zvezde: %d ⭐</string> <string name="profile_label_league">Liga: %s</string> <string name="profile_label_region">Region: %s</string> <string name="profile_qr_title">QR kod za poziv prijatelja</string> <string name="profile_qr_placeholder">[ QR ]</string> <string name="profile_stats_title">Statistika</string> <string name="profile_total_games">Ukupno partija: %d</string> <string name="profile_win_rate">Pobede / Porazi: %d%% / %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_kzz_title">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="profile_stat_kzz">Pogođena pitanja: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_kzz_detail">Pogođeno: %d | Promašeno: %d</string> <string name="profile_stat_moj_broj_title">Moj broj</string> <string name="profile_stat_moj_broj">Tačan rezultat: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_korak_title">Korak po korak</string> <string name="profile_stat_korak">Prosečan korak pogotka: %.1f / 7</string> <string name="profile_stat_asoc_title">Asocijacije</string> <string name="profile_stat_asoc">Rešeno: %d%% | Nerešeno: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_skocko_title">Skočko</string> <string name="profile_stat_skocko">Pogodak u 1–2. pokušaju: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_stat_spojnice_title">Spojnice</string> <string name="profile_stat_spojnice">Uspešno povezano: %d%%</string> <string name="profile_btn_logout">Odjava</string> <string name="profile_section_divider">──────────────</string>
<!-- Ko zna zna --> <string name="kzz_title">Ko zna zna</string> <string name="kzz_player_label">Igra: %s</string> <string name="kzz_question_label">Pitanje %d / 5</string> <string name="kzz_time_left">%d s</string> <string name="kzz_score_label">Bodovi: %d</string> <string name="kzz_correct">Tačno! +10</string> <string name="kzz_wrong">Netačno! −5</string> <string name="kzz_time_up">Vreme isteklo!</string> <string name="kzz_round_end">Kraj igre! Bodovi: %d</string> <string name="kzz_btn_give_up">Predaj</string>
<!-- Spojnice --> <string name="spojnice_title">Spojnice</string> <string name="spojnice_player_label">Igra: %s</string> <string name="spojnice_round_label">Runda %d / 2</string> <string name="spojnice_time_left">%d s</string> <string name="spojnice_scores_label">I1: %d | I2: %d</string> <string name="spojnice_criterion_label">Kriterijum: %s</string> <string name="spojnice_instruction">Tapni levo pa desno da povežeš pojmove</string> <string name="spojnice_correct">+2</string> <string name="spojnice_wrong">Netačno</string> <string name="spojnice_transition">Red na %s</string> <string name="spojnice_no_remaining">Svi pojmovi su povezani!</string> <string name="spojnice_round_end">Kraj runde!</string> <string name="spojnice_game_end">Kraj igre! Igrač 1: %d | Igrač 2: %d</string> <string name="spojnice_btn_give_up">Predaj</string> <string name="spojnice_player1">Igrač 1</string> <string name="spojnice_player2">Igrač 2</string> <string name="spojnice_time_up">Vreme isteklo!</string>
<!-- Skočko --> <string name="skocko_title">Skočko</string> <string name="skocko_time_left">%d s</string> <string name="skocko_instruction">Pogodi tačnu kombinaciju u 6 pokušaja</string> <string name="skocko_btn_give_up">Predaj</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_smiley">Smeško</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_square">Kvadrat</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_circle">Krug</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_heart">Srce</string> <string name="skocko_symbol_triangle">Trougao</string> <string name="skocko_slot_desc">Polje pokušaja</string> <string name="skocko_solution_desc">Rešenje</string>
<!-- Regioni --> <string-array name="regions_array"> <item>Beograd</item> <item>Vojvodina</item> <item>Šumadija</item> <item>Zapadna Srbija</item> <item>Istočna Srbija</item> <item>Južna Srbija</item> <item>Kosovo i Metohija</item> </string-array>
<!-- Asocijacije --> <string name="asoc_title">Asocijacije</string> <string name="asoc_time_left">%d s</string> <string name="asoc_a1">A1</string> <string name="asoc_a2">A2</string> <string name="asoc_a3">A3</string> <string name="asoc_a4">A4</string> <string name="asoc_b1">B1</string> <string name="asoc_b2">B2</string> <string name="asoc_b3">B3</string> <string name="asoc_b4">B4</string> <string name="asoc_a">A</string> <string name="asoc_b">B</string> <string name="asoc_center">\?\?\?</string> <string name="asoc_c">C</string> <string name="asoc_d">D</string> <string name="asoc_c4">C4</string> <string name="asoc_c3">C3</string> <string name="asoc_c2">C2</string> <string name="asoc_c1">C1</string> <string name="asoc_d4">D4</string> <string name="asoc_d3">D3</string> <string name="asoc_d2">D2</string> <string name="asoc_d1">D1</string> <string name="asoc_btn_give_up">Predaj</string>
<!-- Notifikacije --> <string name="notifications_title">Notifikacije</string> <string name="notifications_filter_all">Sve</string> <string name="notifications_filter_read">Pročitane</string> <string name="notifications_filter_unread">Nepročitane</string> <string name="notifications_mark_all_read">Označi sve kao pročitano</string> <string name="notifications_empty">Nema notifikacija</string>
<string name="notification_type_chat">ČET</string> <string name="notification_type_ranking">RANG</string> <string name="notification_type_reward">NAGRADA</string> <string name="notification_type_general">OPŠTE</string> <string name="notification_type_friend_invite">PRIJATELJ</string> <string name="notification_type_league">LIGA</string>
<string name="notification_title_chat">Nova poruka</string> <string name="notification_message_chat">Marko Vam je poslao/la poruku</string> <string name="notification_title_ranking">Rang lista</string> <string name="notification_message_ranking">Postali ste #5 na rang listi</string> <string name="notification_title_reward">Dnevna nagrada</string> <string name="notification_message_reward">Otključali ste dnevnu nagradu</string> <string name="notification_title_general">Liga</string> <string name="notification_message_general">Dobrodošli u novu ligu</string> <string name="notification_title_friend_invite">Zahtev za prijateljstvo</string> <string name="notification_message_friend_invite">Ana Vam je poslala zahtev za prijateljstvo</string> <string name="notification_title_league">Nova liga</string> <string name="notification_message_league">Uznapredovali ste do Srebrne lige!</string>
<string name="notification_action_claim">Preuzmi</string> <string name="notification_action_accept">Prihvati</string>
<string name="notification_channel_chat_name">Ćaskanje</string> <string name="notification_channel_chat_desc">Obaveštenja o porukama u četu</string> <string name="notification_channel_ranking_name">Rang lista</string> <string name="notification_channel_ranking_desc">Promene na rang listi i rezultatima</string> <string name="notification_channel_reward_name">Nagrade</string> <string name="notification_channel_reward_desc">Dnevne i posebne nagrade</string> <string name="notification_channel_general_name">Opšta</string> <string name="notification_channel_general_desc">Opšta obaveštenja aplikacije</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
